text:
There once was a young girl named Marissa. She loved nothing more than exploring in her woods. One sunny morning, she found a bird feather.

It looked old and delicate. She tucked it away in her diary.

That afternoon, clouds appeared. Rain drenched her. She ducked into an old stone cottage.

Who might visit? she wondered.

A woman. Bearded. With black glasses.

She sat beside him.

I have dreams.

He smiled mysteriously.

A lost feather?

So you flew far.

I tried.

He shook his head. Birds climb.

She felt less alone.

One night he came.

Did you find friends?

She laughed.

A big one.

The stars.

Did they love me?

A little. You shine.

She took it off.

We'll see.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
